rationale: Internal refactor removing legacy cursor constructor conditional; no spec behavior change.
CI test failure and reorganization of CSFLE test variant; no driver behavior fix.
GridFS index checking improvement for shell-created indexes; improvement, not a named spec rule violation.
Deprecating legacy w/j/wtimeout options in favor of writeConcern; API ergonomics, not a spec rule violation.
Missing returnNonCachedInstance option in DbOptions types; API/typing issue, no spec involvement.
Caching TypeScript transpilation for faster test runs; build/perf improvement, no spec involvement.
Streaming failure reschedules monitoring immediately; implementation timing issue, no specific SDAM spec rule violated.
JS 'in' vs 'of' bug breaks piped change stream on reconnect; JS implementation error, not spec deviation.
Default 6-minute socket timeout blocking Atlas Data Lake queries; implementation default, no spec rule named.
Description cites driver-bulk-update spec: 'A descriptive error should be raised if execute is called more than once'; driver silently returns.
Infinite loop in pool.js causing OOM; internal implementation bug, no spec rule contradicted.
Refactoring TypeScript enums to plain objects for internal type improvements; no behavior change.
IPv6 address parsing bug in monitor.js splits on ':' breaking IPv6; implementation defect, no specific spec rule named.
Adding internal tryNext cursor method for mongosh REPL needs; new internal API, not a spec fix.
With 'near' read preference, driver fails to select eligible alternate server when preferred is down; violates server-selection spec.
Fixing spec runner regression that always skipped initial ping command in command monitoring; test runner fix.
BulkWriteError missing writeErrors field for single error case; CRUD spec defines consistent bulk error structure.
Improving error message text for empty insertMany; spec-compliant throw already occurs, only message wording improved.
MongoClient cannot reconnect after close; implementation regression, no spec rule requiring client reconnectability.
SDAM and server-selection specs ambiguous on wrong setName in single topology; fix required DRIVERS-980 spec amendment.
Using mock timers to make async timer tests deterministic across OSX/Linux; internal test tooling improvement.
Admin write commands routed to secondary with secondaryPreferred; server-selection spec requires write commands go to primary.
GridFS download stream exception not propagated to error handler; error propagation implementation bug, no spec rule.
maxIdleTimeMS option rejected when passed as object but accepted in connection string; CMAP spec-defined option must be accepted.
Documentation update: allowDiskUse for find requires MongoDB 4.4+; docs ticket, no driver behavior change.
checkServerIdentity: true causes stack overflow via TLS internals; Node.js TLS option handling bug, no spec rule.
Null reference error reading roundTripTime from undefined in monitor; implementation crash, no spec rule contradicted.
Node 14 autoDestroy option causes double 'close' event on cursor stream; Node.js compatibility bug.
Sessions spec: 'implicit session MUST be returned to pool immediately'; cloned cursor reuses session violating this rule.
startSession randomly fails with 'topology does not support sessions'; intermittent implementation bug, no specific spec rule named.
GridFSBucket upload stream pipeline never finishes on Node 14; Node.js version compatibility bug.
autoEncryption sends TopologyVersion.counter as BSON int instead of required long; BSON type violation causing server rejection.
Driver v4 not verifying server TLS identity by default; security issue but no spec-defined default TLS verification rule found.
Windows infinite loop in require_optional package on non-Unix paths; third-party dependency bug.
cursor.setReadPreference() ignored; server-selection spec requires read preference on operation to be honored.
Issue split DRIVERS-1376 + Improvement type; proactive spec rollout for mongos error handling, not existing nonconformance.
Issue split DRIVERS-1437 + Improvement type; proactive spec change to use $collStats instead of count command.
Driver converts hostname to IP for TLS SNI causing cert mismatch; TLS regression, no specific spec rule violated.
Deadlock from shared MongoClient for CSFLE metadata lookup; implementation concurrency bug, depends on DRIVERS-1459.
Issue split DRIVERS-1152 + Improvement; proactive spec rollout to stop inspecting error message strings.
Queries deadlock with autoEncryption + useUnifiedTopology; pool exhaustion implementation bug, no spec rule contradicted.
Replacing instanceof with Object.prototype.toString for ArrayBuffer brand check; internal reliability improvement.
Description cites auth spec environment variables section; AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID env vars ignored, contradicting spec requirement.
Protocol parse errors uncaught (not rejected as promise) with unified topology; error propagation bug, no named spec rule.
Server-side $push aggregation memory limit error; MongoDB server issue, not a driver bug.
tlsAllowInvalidCertificates and tlsAllowInvalidHostnames options ignored in driver v4; connection-string spec options must be honored.
EJSON.serialize fails cross-realm RegExp via instanceof; JS-specific cross-realm object identity issue, not BSON spec rule.
Binary field broken when source is minified due to Buffer class name change; minification compatibility bug, not BSON spec deviation.
Implementing Versioned MongoDB API (Stable API) per DRIVERS-996; new spec feature, driver not previously wrong.
Sort array key order not preserved for numeric keys in driver v4; CRUD spec requires sort array to preserve field order.
